title: The Real Difference Between Your Choices for Selling Digital Products Without PayPal — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a creator based in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, or any other country where PayPal is not available due to government restrictions. You've been searching for a way to sell digital products like ebooks, courses, and art without being limited by PayPal's restrictions. But, what are your options? Each platform has its pros and cons, and understanding the differences is crucial for your success. In this post, we'll dive into the details of each option and help you make an informed decision.
What Each Option Actually Offers

When it comes to selling digital products, each platform offers a unique set of features. PayPal, for instance, is known for its ease of use and widespread acceptance. However, it's not available in many countries, and its fees can be high. Stripe, on the other hand, is a popular choice for entrepreneurs, but it still requires a bank account and can be restrictive. Gumroad is another option, but it's not designed for creators who need more control over their store and sales. In contrast, the Full Stack Bundle offers a complete store infrastructure, including the Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard, all in one payment.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal's restrictions on certain countries are well-documented, and it's often the case that creators in these countries are left with limited options. Stripe is also not available in many countries, and its requirements can be a barrier to entry. Gumroad, while popular, still has its limitations. In contrast, the Full Stack Bundle is designed to be a permanent solution for creators in restricted countries, offering a payment processor that doesn't require KYC or a buyer account, and a store infrastructure that's fully automated and easy to use.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, fees, and real costs, each platform has its own set of rules. PayPal's fees can be high, especially for international transactions. Stripe's fees are generally lower, but its requirements can add up in terms of time and effort. Gumroad's fees are competitive, but its limitations can make it less appealing. In contrast, the Full Stack Bundle offers a one-time payment of $79.99, which includes everything you need to set up your store and start selling digital products immediately, without any hidden fees or costs.
PayPal's restrictions on certain countries can be a major barrier to entry for creators.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation and delivery capabilities are crucial for creators who want to sell digital products quickly and easily. PayPal's automation features are limited, and its delivery capabilities are not always reliable. Stripe's automation features are better, but its requirements can still be a barrier to entry. Gumroad's automation features are decent, but its limitations can make it less appealing. In contrast, the Full Stack Bundle offers instant automated delivery, no payment processor account required, and a fully automated store infrastructure that's easy to use and set up.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

So, which option is right for you? If you're a creator in a restricted country, the Full Stack Bundle is a permanent solution that offers a complete store infrastructure, including the Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard, all in one payment. If you're looking for a more traditional solution, PayPal or Stripe might be a good choice. However, if you're looking for a platform that's designed specifically for creators in restricted countries, with a focus on automation, delivery capabilities, and ease of use, the Full Stack Bundle is the way to go.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
The Full Stack Bundle offers a complete store infrastructure, including automation, delivery capabilities, and ease of use, without any hidden fees or costs.

If you're a creator in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, or any other country where PayPal is not available, or if you're looking for a more traditional solution like Stripe or Gumroad, take a look at the Full Stack Bundle, which offers a complete store infrastructure, including the Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard, all in one payment. Your Action Checklist

To get started with the Full Stack Bundle, follow these steps: Set up your store using the Core Shop Engine and Web3 Wallet Connect; Add your digital products and set prices; Configure the Admin Dashboard to manage orders and analytics; Test your store with a few sample products; Launch your store and start selling digital products; Monitor your sales and adjust pricing and product offerings as needed.
With the Full Stack Bundle, you can start selling digital products immediately, without any requirements or restrictions.
